title: Balance with a gyroscope
description: Use a gyroscope and tuned drive base to keep a two-wheeled platform upright.

dialogue.text: Ever seen a robot balance on two wheels? With odometry in place, we'll use a gyro to keep a platform upright.
Grab an Arduino Uno, two continuous servos, an MPU-6050 gyroscope breakout, and the encoder-equipped chassis you've already tuned.
Use the MPU6050 and Servo libraries. Read the gyro angle and adjust servo speeds with a simple PID loop. Watch encoder feedback to keep the bot centered while you tune the gains.
